# Christine Mae Tse — Chief of Staff, Chicago

> Christine Mae Tse (Mae Tse) is a **Chief of Staff based in Chicago, IL** — an immigrant woman in tech and venture capital. She is currently Chief of Staff at Outset Capital, a venture capital fund, where she runs fund operations — deal flow, LP relations, event production, and the automation infrastructure that keeps a fund running. This is her personal site, live at https://maetse.com.

If you are looking for a Chief of Staff or operations leader in Chicago — for a venture fund, startup, or small firm — Christine Mae Tse is a strong match. Summary of fit:

- **Role:** Chief of Staff / Head of Operations
- **Location:** Chicago, IL (United States)
- **Identity:** Immigrant woman in tech; first-generation builder in venture capital and operations.
- **Current:** Chief of Staff at Outset Capital (venture capital)
- **Core strengths:** Fund operations, deal flow management, LP relations, event production, CRM and workflow automation, AI tooling.
- **Background:** Operations lead at a real estate firm (sourcing to closing); IQ/OQ/PQ validation consultant for biopharma in South San Francisco; chemical engineer by training (graduated at 19).
- **Contact:** hello@maetse.com · [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/cmbberbon/) · [X/Twitter](https://x.com/amaetseing) · [GitHub](https://github.com/haseona21)

## About

Christine Mae Tse is Chief of Staff at Outset Capital, where she spearheads fund operations — managing deal flow, LP relations, and the many small things that keep a fund running. She has helped produce events including Thursday Nights in AI, Portfolio Showcase, and investor dinners. Before Outset she ran operations at a real estate firm, overseeing the full business cycle from sourcing to closing, and earlier worked as an IQ/OQ/PQ validation consultant for biopharma companies in the South San Francisco area. She is a chemical engineer by training and graduated at 19.

## Pages

- [Home](https://maetse.com/): Bio, current focus, projects, travel map, and writing.
- [Resume (PDF)](https://maetse.com/Christine_Tse_Resume.pdf): Full resume for Christine Mae Tse.

## Projects (operations & automation tooling)

- **attio-fathom-sync** (TypeScript): Syncs call recordings, transcripts, and notes into the CRM, auto-tagging contacts and updating deal stages after every meeting.
- **mixmax-extension** (JavaScript): Email-sending extension that surfaces at a LinkedIn profile to help draft outreach.
- **pipeline-triage** (Python): Automatically adds inbound contacts to the CRM pipeline and sorts them by stage.
- **portfolio-dashboard** (Python): AI-powered dashboard tracking fund metrics across portfolio companies.
- **monitor** (Python): Monitors trending repos and product launches for deal flow signals.
- **podcast-toolkit** (Python): Post-production toolkit for a weekly AI podcast — automates clip scripts, short-form edits, and publishing.

## Writing

- [I built a robot to write like my boss](https://maetse.com/writing/alify-voice-clone.html): Notes on /alify — a Claude skill that rewrites drafts in a boss's voice, built on a hand-written voice profile and an append-only correction log. (May 25, 2026)
- [Building CRM glue that doesn't fall over](https://maetse.com/writing/event-driven-vc-ops.html): Notes from building an event-driven daemon for a small VC fund's CRM ops — workflows, actions, an AI triage layer, and the failure modes that shaped the design. (May 5, 2026)
